# Payment Gateway Logos

Place the following logo images in this directory:

1. **zarinpal-logo.png** - زرین‌پال (Zarinpal) logo
2. **saman-bank-logo.png** - بانک سامان (Saman Bank) logo  
3. **mellat-bank-logo.png** - بانک ملت (Mellat Bank) logo

The images will be automatically loaded in the payment section.
